qa_pairs.question: How can PyKeOps numpy bindings be tested after setting up the environment?
qa_pairs.answer: To test PyKeOps numpy bindings, you can execute the command `python -c 'import pykeops; pykeops.test_numpy_bindings()'`. When using a GPU setup, this command also verifies that nvrtc bindings are found.

qa_pairs.question: What is the recommended procedure before submitting a PyKeOps job script to the scheduler, and why is it important?
qa_pairs.answer: Before submitting a PyKeOps job script to the scheduler, it is important to test that your submission script will start without errors. A quick test can be performed using an interactive job.

qa_pairs.question: What command is used to submit a PyKeOps job script to the scheduler?
qa_pairs.answer: To submit a PyKeOps job to the scheduler, you would use the command `sbatch submit-keops.sh`.
